headline: WILLIAMS SONOMA AND NO KID HUNGRY PARTNER WITH CELEBRITIES, CHEFS AND INFLUENCERS FOR ANNUAL CAMPAIGN TO END CHILDHOOD HUNGER IN AMERICA
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, July 06, 2026--Williams Sonoma Launched Annual Tools For Change Campaign Featuring Celebrity Designed Spatulas Benefiting No Kid Hungry

headline: 3 Consumer Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: Retailers are overhauling their operations as technology redefines the shopping experience. Still, demand can be volatile as the industry is exposed to the ups and downs of consumer spending. This has stirred some uncertainty lately as retail stocks have lagged the market over the past six months, posting a return of 1.8% compared to 7.7% for the S&P 500.
